author: @NutchapolSal

text:
Well no one had covered that Drop the Dodongo bit for the last five years, so I thought it was just simply useless to have it here. And No was cut out because it simply doesn't fit with Avast Your Ass. I probably would've cut it out in the original remake as well, if it wasn't for my lack of experience and my dedication to stick to the source material.  :/

Anyway, glad you liked it.  :)

text: where is the B-Side?
author: @kyokuP

text:
...Uuhm, one moment.
Takes a deep breath
First there was Medley of YTPMV by Reourom. It didn't sound that good, so I remade it, people liked it. (1st medley)
Then there was YTPMD by Reourom. It didn't sound that good either, so I remade it, people liked it. (2nd medley)
Then there were no further medleys by Reourom. Wanting to keep the ball rolling, I made C-Side of YTPMV, people liked it. (3rd medley)
Still wanting to keep the ball rolling, I made D-Side of YTPMV, people liked it. (4th medley)
While making D-Side, I finally reached a sound quality that I was satisfied with. With the gathered know-how I remade the first remake, result being this video, people seem to be liking it. (Remix of 1st medley)

So in short: What you're looking for at the moment is my remix of YTPMD, a.k.a. Remake of YTPMD. Until I remake that one as well, then there would be an actual B-Side of YTPMV.
